title: chore: audit full repo on harness v1.1.3
goal: Full repository Pro audit under harness v1.1.3 after PR #29 repair, with no product runtime changes unless Critical or High safety fix is required.
rollbackOrStopCondition: Revert this audit PR if evidence drifts, required checks weaken, or product runtime behavior changes without Critical or High justification.
allowedScope: small safety fixes if Critical or High
doneCriteria: High findings 0 unresolved or explicitly fixed
required checks pass on PR head
securityBoundaries: PR #28 evidence is not reused for merge readiness.
No unsafe GitHub logs were read.
No runtime, production, legal, or YouTube policy readiness claim is made.
No token sale, exchange, cash-out, custody, internal balance, investment wording, speculative reward, or YouTube scraping is introduced.
PR template change only adds the Testing and review evidence heading required by the prompt eval suite.
residualRisks: PR #26 remains open and stale until owner decision.
PR #22 remains open and must be refreshed independently before any merge decision.
Historical PR docs contain archived evidence examples that may deserve later docs cleanup if parser scope changes.
Local forge is unavailable on this machine.
humanConfirmation: current head SHA verified after PR checks
CI status verified after PR checks
quality-gate status verified after PR checks

packageVerification.verification: No package scripts or dependencies are changed.

apiCompatibilitySummary.statement: No product API, contract ABI, YouTube connector, Chain Listener, IRIS delivery, or runtime payload contract is changed.

runtimeSmokeRationale: No runtime readiness is claimed; this PR is a safe-summary full repository audit only.

reviewScope.scope: Full repo audit docs and machine-readable evidence under harness v1.1.3.
reviewScope.riskSummary: Main risk is stale open PR cleanup and historical evidence noise; product runtime behavior is intentionally unchanged.
reviewScope.verificationOracle: Safe-summary scans, local checks, evidence CI, quality self-protection, secret scan, no-scraping scan, and GitHub PR metadata.

riskSurface: minimal PR template evidence heading alignment
oracle: Safe artifact reason codes, PR metadata, local verification commands, prompt governance eval, evidence CI, and quality self-protection.
splitRequired: no - Critical and High findings are zero; Medium and Low findings are documented.
bestOfNEvidence: Best of N skipped because this is a bounded audit and no Critical or High implementation choice was required.
reviewIndependence: Writer evidence is audit scans and metadata. Reviewer checklist verifies no unsafe GitHub log access, no PR #28 reuse, no product runtime change, no manual gate behavior change, and no prohibited scope.
riskLevelSummary: R3 because this audit touches harness evidence surfaces and PR template evidence contract while avoiding product runtime code.
filesOrScope: Docs, .codex evidence, and .github/pull_request_template.md evidence heading alignment only.
solvabilityConstraints: No raw GitHub logs, no PR #28 evidence reuse, no product runtime changes, no provider apply, no readiness claims.
reasoningEvidence: Safe-summary artifact analysis identified PR evidence/profile drift; local checks and prompt governance fixture verify the minimal repair.
